reason: Response B demonstrates richer depth, more specific examples (40-65 independent eye evolutions, the thylacine/wolf 160-million-year divergence), and a more developed philosophical arc about contingency versus necessity, which is characteristic of the more capable Sonnet model. Response A is competent and well-structured but stays at a more general conceptual level with fewer concrete details, fitting Haiku's lighter touch. The greater factual density and layered argumentation in B point to Sonnet.
